meta.description: Baruch Software | Cloud-agnostic solutions, high-performance backend, modern stack architecture & AI-native systems. Engineering excellence. No boundaries.

hero.badge: Excellence in Engineering. Powered by Intelligence.
hero.title: Engineering Excellence. No Boundaries.
hero.subtitle: From complex cloud architectures to AI-driven systems, we build the foundations of tomorrow's technology.

services.title: What We Build
services.subtitle: Cloud-agnostic solutions, modern stacks, and intelligence integration—without vendor lock-in.

cloud.title: Scalable Cloud Engineering
cloud.description: Solutions across any cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP. High-performance backend design, cost optimization, and infrastructure that scales with you.

custom.title: Custom Software Development
custom.description: Tailored systems built with modern, efficient stacks. From APIs to full products—clean architecture and long-term maintainability.

ai.title: AI-Native Systems
ai.description: Intelligence integration into existing workflows. We embed AI where it adds value while keeping security and governance in your control.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Structured, transparent, and built for long-term partnership.

step1.title: Discovery & Alignment
step1.description: We define scope, success metrics, and architecture. No surprises—only clear expectations.

step2.title: Build & Ship
step2.description: Iterative delivery with modern practices and quality gates. Full visibility and control at every step.

step3.title: Iterate & Optimize
step3.description: Continuous improvement. Performance, security, and scalability stay on the roadmap.

closing.title: Built for Teams That Expect More
closing.text: From enterprises to scaling startups, we bring the same standard: engineering excellence, powered by intelligence. No hype—just results.
closing.cta: Let's talk about your next project.

contact.title: Start a Conversation
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your goals. We respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Baruch Software — Engineering Excellence. No Boundaries.
